
### importance of prediction 



* 5-stage pipeline, predict not-taken versus always stall
 

::: {.r-stack}
![](/pipeline/texfig/costOfStalling.figure-1.svg){.fragment .fade-in-then-out fragment-index=1}

![](/pipeline/texfig/costOfStalling.figure-2.svg){.fragment .fade-in-then-out fragment-index=2}


:::
 [* --- ignoring data hazards]{.mycredit}

<!-- \iftoggle(heldback,costOfStalling,costOfStalling) -->

### prediction and OOO 


* deeper pipeline --- much higher misprediction penalty
